releases.name: 1.0.3 Public Release

releases.author: scottgrayart
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/scottgrayart/play-with-checkboxs/compare/0.1.0...0.2.0
## 🎉 Release 0.2.0  (Pre-Community)

This is an early release for testing before submission to the Obsidian Community Plugins directory.

### Features
- Lists can be checkbox or radio as can sub-lists be
- tags are saved by accumulating the tags for each input concatenated with '/'

### Installation

Since this plugin is not yet in the community directory, manual installation is required:

1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`
2. Create a folder in your Obsidian vault: `VaultFolder/.obsidian/plugins/your-plugin-name/`
3. Copy the downloaded files into this folder
4. Reload Obsidian
5. Go to Settings → Community Plugins
6. Enable your plugin

### Known Issues
- So far so good

### Coming Soon
- Hide sublists until the parent is checked
---

**Note:** This is a pre-release version for early testing. Additional features will be added before submitting to the official Obsidian Community Plugins directory.
releases.name: v0.2.0 - pre-community releas

releases.author: scottgrayart
releases.description:
## 🎉 Initial Release (Pre-Community)

This is an early release for testing before submission to the Obsidian Community Plugins directory.

### Features
- Codeblocks for checkboxs like ```checkboxs
- Definitions are YAML
- checkbox list can be nested
- Each box can have a tag value that is used to update tags in frontmatter

### Installation

Since this plugin is not yet in the community directory, manual installation is required:

1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` (if applicable) from the Assets below
2. Create a folder in your Obsidian vault: `VaultFolder/.obsidian/plugins/your-plugin-name/`
3. Copy the downloaded files into this folder
4. Reload Obsidian
5. Go to Settings → Community Plugins
6. Enable your plugin

### Known Issues
- List any known issues or limitations

### Coming Soon
- Additional features planned before community submission
- Hide sub-lists until parent is checked
- Option for horizontal lists (use radio buttons?)

---

**Note:** This is a pre-release version for early testing. Additional features will be added before submitting to the official Obsidian Community Plugins directory.
releases.name: v0.1.0 - Pre-Community Release
